name: Rooster Bold/Marc Anciel
description:
Physical appearance

Marc is a tall and slender teenage boy with messy Rock style black hair with blues reflections, vivid green eyes with visible lashes, thick eyebrows, pink lips, and a slender face with a pointed chin. His appearance is somewhat feminine.

Civilian attire

Marc wears a V-neck rainbow tie-dye shirt with a rippled colored pattern originating from the center. He also wears a bright red jacket with hood and white drawstrings. He has a pair of black leather fingerless gloves, a black leather collar around his neck. He wears moderate azure jeans with the bottoms rolled up and a pair of black boots with faint "oil slick" rainbow blotches.

He has a belt with a square silver buckle and square-nails chains hanging from it around his thighs. On his hands, his nails are painted black.

As Rooster Bold

Rooster Bold wears a midnight black (with a slight blue-ish tint) skin-tight outfit which is covered by a fire red tail coat with a midnight black and multiple long feather-like tails going down from around his waist. The coat has golden accents and darker feather-shaped sections out the middle. He has a short red necktie and his golden boots resemble rooster legs, with spurs included. He wears little over-hanging plain red mask covering his eyes. His hair is black, shaved with three big red strands that resemble a rooster's comb.
creator: Light-To-Night
